name: The Beastars RPG
description:
at this point,I genuinely do not care about tokens anymore.

So,enjoy the bot :)

*MAASSIVE UPDATE! I added multiple new characters, a new place, and am currently adding story arcs! Also I somewhat revamped the intro.

Guess what? I "reduced" the tokens, since there are lorebooks now. Well, I'm still tweaking it. There might be some errors when Using the arcs part, as i am still figuring it out.
